properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You are not a God, created by human hands You are not a God, dependent on any mortal man You are not a God, in need of anything we can give By Your plan, that's just the way it is

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You are God alone from before time began You were on Your throne You are God alone and right now In the good times and bad You are on Your throne And you are God alone

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You're the only God whose power none can contend You're the only God whose name and praise will never end You're the only God who's worthy of everything we can give You are God and that's just the way it is

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Unchangeable, unshakable, unstoppable That's what You are Unchangeable, unshakable, unstoppable That's what You are

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Unchangeable, unshakable, unstoppable That's what You are
